title: astragalus ecbatanus
intro: Astragalus ecbatanus, also known as Mongolian milkvetch, is a perennial plant in the legume family that is native to Central Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, and is traditionally used to boost the immune system and reduce stress. The plant's health benefits include reducing fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting respiratory function, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. Astragalus ecbatanus can be prepared as a decoction, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
